message:
test(oracle): add 5 conformance tests for subquery+GROUP BY, DISTINCT ordering, IN subquery+HAVING, interleaved DML, GROUP BY numeric/alias

Documents known gap: correlated scalar subqueries in SELECT list with
GROUP BY return NULL (column references not resolved through grouped row
context).  All other queries pass with zero mismatches.
Core: 1721 pass, 0 fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
